prompt:

He is sitting powerfully on the hood of a classic black American muscle car parked in the middle of an empty desert highway.

A giant artistic portrait of the same man appears behind him in the sky, creating a dramatic layered composition. Explosive black, white, and deep red paint splashes burst around the background with high-energy abstract ink effects. Strong masculine pose, confident expression, rugged cinematic vibe.

The environment features a long straight road, dry desert mountains, cloudy sky, cinematic lighting, ultra-detailed textures, realistic skin pores, sharp beard details, glossy car reflections, high contrast shadows, moody atmosphere, premium action-poster aesthetic, symmetrical composition, depth of field, ultra HD 8K quality, hyper realistic digital art, trending on ArtStation.
